# Diagnostic Plumbing

> Locally owned plumbing company serving the Phoenix East Valley — Gilbert, Chandler, Mesa, Scottsdale, Tempe, Queen Creek, San Tan Valley, and Phoenix. Triple-licensed: CR-37 Plumbing (#327364), B-3 General Remodeling (#332463), CR-61 Carpentry & Remodeling (#327365). Phone: (480) 220-1266.

## Services

### Plumbing
- [Drain Cleaning](/services/drain-cleaning/)
- [High-Speed Drain Cleaning](/services/high-speed-drain-cleaning/)
- [Water Heater Repair & Replacement](/services/water-heaters/)
- [Whole-Home Repipes](/services/repipes/)
- [Plumbing Repairs](/services/plumbing-repairs/)
- [Emergency Plumbing (24/7)](/emergency-plumbing/)
- [Commercial & Hospitality Plumbing](/commercial-hospitality/)

### Water Quality
- [Water Softener Installation & Service](/water-quality/water-softeners/)
- [Whole-Home Water Filtration](/water-quality/whole-home-filtration/)
- [Reverse Osmosis Systems](/water-quality/reverse-osmosis/)

### Remodeling
- [Bathroom & Kitchen Remodeling](/services/remodeling/)
